name: Aemje Architect-root
description: Root orchestrator for Aemje Architect project

scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.dev:frontend: cross-env PORT=3001 npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build:aws: cross-env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=http://65.1.93.48 npm run build --prefix frontend
